title: pelargonium × nitidum
intro: Pelargonium × nitidum, also known as 'Silver Mist', is a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant family, characterized by its unique silver-gray leaves and vibrant flower colors. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of rosmarinic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × nitidum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health concerns, such as colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
